label: Tech / Semiconductors (Margin + Cycle focus)

deferred_concepts.reason: Inventory concept not yet in memo-fetch (XBRL InventoryNet exists; deferred to v2.2.0-c-followup-inventory)
capex / revenue is computable today; reserved for next schema iteration to keep launch lean
Bookings vs billings — supplemental disclosure (semi-equipment specific)

notes: Semiconductor cycles drive valuation — gross margin (capacity utilization proxy) + FCF margin (capex-cycle survival) are the dominant indicators. trailingPE retained because semi issuers (unlike SaaS) generally have positive GAAP earnings even at cycle troughs. evEbitda retained because semi capital intensity makes EBITDA a meaningful normalized-cycle metric (depreciation reflects real cash deployment). priceToBook absent because book is heavily distorted by goodwill from M&A (e.g. AVGO/VMware) and capacity expansions.
